title: SelfServiceProfileSsoTicketConnectionConfig
description: If provided, this will create a new connection for the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow with the given configuration

name.description: The name of the connection that will be created as a part of the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow.

display_name.description: Connection name used in the new universal login experience

is_domain_connection.description: true promotes to a domain-level connection so that third-party applications can use it. false does not promote the connection, so only first-party applications with the connection enabled can use it. (Defaults to false.)

show_as_button.description: Enables showing a button for the connection in the login page (new experience only). If false, it will be usable only by HRD. (Defaults to false.)
